title: Basanacantha hebecarpa
taxonomy: Basanacantha hebecarpa is classified within the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the nettle family. This plant belongs to the genus Basanacantha, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Basanacantha hebecarpa further breaks down into the kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. It is also sometimes referred to as a synonym of Boehmeria hebecarpa, indicating its close relationship with other plants in the Boehmeria genus. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of Basanacantha hebecarpa.
